name: ptj-pwa
description: No-backend, offline-first PWA shell for ptj. WasmBackend + opt-in browser transports.
//: Authoring-only scratch manifest. The integrated tree wires build scripts (wasm-bindgen + bundler) via the shared frontend build. See wasm-packaging.md for the cargo/wasm-bindgen/wasm-opt pipeline. No build is run by this component (authoring only).
